allow: PowerShell($logPath = "$env:APPDATA\\.mbchat\\update.log"; if \(Test-Path $logPath\) { Get-Content $logPath -Tail 30 } else { "Log nao encontrado em $logPath" })
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\.mbchat\\" | Select-Object Name, LastWriteTime | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\MBChat" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, LastWriteTime | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 10)
